note.summary: Zero trades executed (0/3746 candidates reached fills). Two candidates reached execution gate but both rejected for underdog_price_below_floor. 3699 rejected before execution: 584 by directional filters, 2548 directional_disabled, 45 baseline_cohort_gate. TradingView integration observing 375 valid signals with 44.8% forward hit rate (below 50% random baseline), suggesting no directional edge. No evidence of alpha; system is correctly conservative.
